hero.subtitle: One in five footballers re-tears the same muscle. Twinspire reads what's happening inside — before it happens.

about.headline: This Started With One Injury. Then a Second.
about.p1: Pouya was a professional football player. He tore his hamstring and went through the full rehabilitation process: GPS monitoring, clinical assessment, and gradual return to training. He was cleared to play.
about.p2: Eight weeks later he tore it again.
about.p3: The second injury was not due to bad luck; the warning signs were present, but the process lacked the tools to detect them. He left professional football and returned to DTU to address this gap. His injury became the research question, and the research led to Twinspire.
about.imageAlt: Pouya on the football pitch wearing an orange training bib

team.heading: Built by People Who've Been on the Treatment Table

builtFor.heading: Built for the People Who Keep Footballers on the Pitch.

footballers.title: Footballers
footballers.description: Your body generates data every session, much of which is lost when you change clubs. Twinspire returns this data to you. Your Athletic Passport records your complete history — sessions, recovery, injuries — and an AI coach helps you interpret it, understand your readiness, and identify areas for improvement. You control what your club can access.

coaches.title: Coaches and Performance Staff
coaches.description: Access neuromuscular load, recovery signals, and deviation alerts for your entire squad, including athlete-owned wearable data. Plan training based on real physiological insights to keep your best players available when it matters most.

physio.title: Physiotherapists
physio.description: Receive objective decision support with customisable thresholds and metrics at every stage. Monitor deviations from personal baselines, recovery trends, and capacity signals across data sources, with clear explanations and recommended actions.

science.heading: Many Platforms Measure Load. We Connect It to Individual Responses.
science.body: Based on DTU research in digital twins and sequential learning for physiological time series, Twinspire integrates multimodal signals and translates them into clear, actionable decision support outputs.

trust.heading: The Data Belongs to the Athlete. Full Stop.
trust.body: GDPR-compliant from day one. EU servers. Never sold. Never shared. The Athletic Passport belongs to the athlete. The squad data belongs to the club. We host it — we do not own it.
trust.bullet1: Designed for GDPR compliance and DPAs
trust.bullet3: Built with Danish research and innovation partners

problem.headline: You're Making Sunday's Decision with Tuesday's Data.
problem.p1: One in four elite injuries is a hamstring injury. Nearly one in five players tears it again, most within eight weeks of returning. The reinjury rate has not moved in a decade.
problem.p3: The tools have not kept up with either.

cta.title: Ready to See What Your Squad's Data Is Actually Telling You?
cta.subtitle: We are onboarding founding partners across the Nordics this quarter. Clubs that join now shape the product, get priority access, and preferred pricing.
cta.stats: 71 athletes. 2 active clubs. 18 months of real data.
